diagrams.title: OS Position in Computer System
diagrams.description: Shows OS as intermediary layer between hardware and user applications
diagrams.purpose: Understand OS role as intermediary between users and hardware

diagrams.title: OS Evolution Timeline
diagrams.description: Timeline showing major phases of OS development from batch to modern systems
diagrams.purpose: Visualize chronological development of operating systems

diagrams.title: Boot Process Flowchart
diagrams.description: Step-by-step flowchart of computer boot sequence from power on to OS loading
diagrams.purpose: Understand how computer starts up and OS gets loaded into memory
